subsection.name: Description
subsection.div: Checks that elements annotated with specified annotations have only allowed visibility modifiers.
subsection.p: This check enforces consistency between annotation presence and declared visibility. If a configured annotation is found on a target element, its visibility modifier must match one of the allowed values.

tr.td: Setter for allowed visibility modifiers. Allowed values: public, protected, private, package-private

subset of tokens
CLASS_DEF , INTERFACE_DEF , ENUM_DEF , RECORD_DEF , METHOD_DEF , CTOR_DEF , VARIABLE_DEF , ANNOTATION_DEF .
CLASS_DEF , INTERFACE_DEF , ENUM_DEF , RECORD_DEF , METHOD_DEF , CTOR_DEF , VARIABLE_DEF , ANNOTATION_DEF .

subsection.name: Examples
subsection.p: To configure the check for only methods:

pre.code: <module name="Checker"> <module name="TreeWalker"> <module name="AnnotatedMethodVisibilityModifier"> <property name="tokens" value="PACKAGE_DEF, IMPORT, METHOD_DEF"/> </module> </module> </module>

subsection.p: To configure the annotations and allowed visibility:

pre.code: <module name="Checker"> <module name="TreeWalker"> <module name="AnnotatedMethodVisibilityModifier"> <property name="annotations" value="com.google.common.annotations.Beta, com.google.common.annotations.VisibleForTesting"/> <property name="visibility" value="package-private"/> </module> </module> </module>

subsection.name: Violation Messages
subsection.p: All messages can be customized if the default message doesn't suit you. Please see the documentation to learn how to.
